title: Lesson Playback State Machine
rationale: Before tutoring broadens interactivity, the system must reliably play lesson content with explicit pause, resume, and interrupt semantics inside the validated session envelope. This keeps tutoring anchored to canonical lesson progression rather than free-form drift.
focus_hint: Build explicit playback states and transitions that consume canonical lesson records from Phase 1. Do not let playback escape the active lesson or bypass session validation.
acceptance_criteria: Lesson playback exposes deterministic states such as idle, presenting, paused, interrupted, completed
Pause, resume, and interrupt transitions preserve the same session envelope and lesson binding
Playback cannot advance content for a different child or different lesson
Playback emits structured state snapshots that later tutoring acts can consume
